title: Donguler (for/while)
subtitle: for ve while donguleri, range, enumerate.
code:
# for dongusu ile range
print("1'den 5'e kadar:")
for i in range(1, 6):
    print("Sayi:", i)

# while dongusu
print("\nGeri sayim:")
counter = 5
while counter > 0:
    print(counter)
    counter -= 1

# Liste uzerinde dongu
print("\nMeyveler:")
fruits = ["Elma", "Armut", "Muz", "Karpuz"]
for fruit in fruits:
    print("-", fruit)

# enumerate ile indeks
print("\nIndeksli liste:")
for index, fruit in enumerate(fruits):
    print(f"{index}: {fruit}")

# break ve continue
print("\nBreak/continue ornegi:")
for i in range(10):
    if i == 3:
        continue
    if i == 7:
        break
    print(i)

# List comprehension
print("\nList comprehension (kareler):")
squares = [x * x for x in range(1, 6)]
print(squares)
